name: tech-edge-ai-hardware
description: Use web_search to search for 'edge AI hardware NPU Apple Neural Engine Qualcomm Snapdragon comparison'. Same edge AI articles will appear. Compare the major edge AI hardware: Apple Neural Engine, Qualcomm Snapdragon NPU, and Google Tensor TPU. One sentence each. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: Apple's Neural Engine in the A19 Bionic delivers ~35 TOPS at 2-5W, tightly integrated with Core ML and the Apple Silicon ecosystem for optimized on-device inference on iPhones and Macs. Qualcomm's Hexagon NPU in the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 achieves ~45 TOPS with a 45% energy efficiency improvement over its predecessor, powering on-device AI across hundreds of millions of Android smartphones and robotics platforms. Google's Edge TPU provides 4 TOPS at just 2W for TensorFlow Lite models on IoT and embedded systems, while its cloud TPUs (Ironwood/v7) deliver datacenter-scale performance at 4,614 TFLOPS for training and inference workloads.
key_facts: Apple A19 Neural Engine delivers ~35 TOPS at 2-5W, integrated with Core ML
Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 Hexagon NPU achieves ~45 TOPS with 45% energy efficiency improvement over prior generation
Google Edge TPU provides 4 TOPS at 2W for TensorFlow Lite models on embedded/IoT devices
Next-generation mobile NPUs may reach 100-200 TOPS, enabling multi-billion parameter on-device LLMs
